Name: Light Set
Description: Defines a collection of directional, local, and hemispheric lighting parameters used to construct the scene's direct and indirect lighting model. Supports multiple light slots with independent color, direction, and shading behavior, as well as SSAO and mask-based influence controls.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Angle: 0
Fields.Description: Direction of the first directional light, typically defined as azimuth and elevation angles for sun-like lighting.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Diffuse Color: 0
Fields.Description: Diffuse (Lambertian) color contribution of directional light 0, controlling base surface illumination.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Specular Color: 0
Fields.Description: Specular highlight color for directional light 0, affecting reflected light intensity and tint.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Sharpness: 0
Fields.Description: Controls specular highlight tightness for directional light 0. Higher values produce sharper, more concentrated highlights.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: SSAO Weight: 0
Fields.Description: Scales how much screen-space ambient occlusion affects directional light 0's contribution.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Angle: 1
Fields.Description: Direction of the second directional light, typically used for secondary sun or fill lighting.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Diffuse Color: 1
Fields.Description: Diffuse color contribution of directional light 1.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Specular Color: 1
Fields.Description: Specular color contribution of directional light 1.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Sharpness: 1
Fields.Description: Specular sharpness control for directional light 1.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: SSAO Weight: 1
Fields.Description: SSAO influence factor for directional light 1.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Angle: 1
Fields.Description: Orientation of local light 1, typically defining spotlight or point-light directionality.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Diffuse Color: 1
Fields.Description: Diffuse contribution of local light 1.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Specular Color: 1
Fields.Description: Specular contribution of local light 1.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Sharpness: 1
Fields.Description: Specular sharpness for local light 1, controlling highlight falloff.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: SSAO Weight: 2
Fields.Description: SSAO influence factor for directional light 2.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Angle: 2
Fields.Description: Orientation of local light 2.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Diffuse Color: 2
Fields.Description: Diffuse contribution of local light 2.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Specular Color: 2
Fields.Description: Specular contribution of local light 2.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Sharpness: 2
Fields.Description: Specular sharpness for local light 2.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: SSAO Weight: 3
Fields.Description: SSAO influence factor for directional light 3.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Hemisphere Color Up
Fields.Description: Sky-facing hemisphere lighting color used for ambient gradient lighting.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Hemisphere Color Down
Fields.Description: Ground-facing hemisphere lighting color used for ambient gradient lighting.

Fields.Name: Light 1: Follow Camera
Fields.Description: When enabled, light 1 orientation or position follows the camera, useful for view-relative lighting effects.

Fields.Name: Enable Local Light: 1
Fields.Description: Enables or disables local light 1.

Fields.Name: Enable Local Light: 2
Fields.Description: Enables or disables local light 2.

Fields.Name: Light Mask Influence
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly light masking affects the final lighting contribution, allowing selective light attenuation or region-based lighting control.
